query: Tokyo Metropolis population 2025 official estimated population 2025 14 million
answer: Tokyo's official estimated population for 2025 is 14 million. This figure reflects the city's ongoing urbanization and demographic trends. The estimate is based on government projections.

results.title: Home | Tokyo Tokyo Official Website |
results.snippet: Kita City is a special area offering valuable cultural experiences in Tokyo’s lively neighborhood. ### Timeless and Natural: Enchanting Echoes of Edo. Explore places in Tokyo that highlight its abundant nature and traditions from its days as the samurai capital of Edo. Located near the heart of the metropolis, Bunkyo City is home to two sprawling gardens that are among the oldest in Tokyo. While diligently upholding the past’s ideas and traditions, from art to music to food and infinitely more, Tokyo is a city that never stops pushing forward to embrace the latest technological advances. ### Nature and Tradition: New Sides to Tokyo After Dark. Enjoy food and drinks along an alley with 20th-century charm in Kamata in Ota City or embrace the calm of Hinohara Village to see a new side to Tokyo after dark. Learn about Tokyo, where centuries-old traditions and cutting-edge technological innovations meet to form a unique cultural landscape. In October 2025, the “Tokyo Tokyo Old Meets New – Come Discover the Culture of Tokyo” event was ...

results.title: Tokyo | Kanto | Destinations | Travel Japan
results.snippet: As Japan's capital and the world's most populous metropolis, Tokyo offers tradition and innovation, and unlimited opportunities to eat, shop and explore.
